context: Evaluates the implementation of the 'Infrastructure-Module' (IM) and its relationship with the 'Business-Module' (BM) according to the Dependency Inversion Principle and 'Wiring' instructions of MIM.

checklist.name: IM depends on BM
checklist.description: Dependency flows correctly: the Infrastructure-Module depends on the Business-Module, while the BM has zero dependencies on the IM.

checklist.name: Interface implementation
checklist.description: The Infrastructure-Module implements at least one interface defined in the Business-Module (Adapter).

checklist.name: Dependency Injection wiring
checklist.description: Shows the wiring or injection of the IM's implementation into the BM's service or classes.

checklist.name: Infrastructure Isolation
checklist.description: Business-Module remains free of any technical implementations such as database drivers or HTTP libraries.
